content.text: Let's use a dedicated background worker for the email queue. Extract the send loop into a worker module.
I'll extract the send loop into a dedicated worker module.

payload.summary: Nested task thread for the email worker extraction. Codex has no first-class subagent; this is a secondary thread id carried in turn_context.

content.text: Done. The email send loop now runs in a dedicated worker module spawned from main.
